utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists three named plans with individual monthly costs and a total. This is fully specified for costs, though benefits are not detailed, but the format only asks for costs. Count as included.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists a primary home/contents coverage and two add-ons with individual monthly costs and a total. Count as included.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists a travel plan and two add-ons with individual monthly costs and a total. Count as included.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists many services but does not provide costs for them; it says "included within the above packages" but does not assign costs. The format explicitly requires costs, so this is not fully specified. Count as not included.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly total, annual total, comparison savings, and start date. Count as included.
Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific items. I matched each item name to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. For health: LifeFirst Standard Plan and PrimeCare Premium Plan exist; Preventive Care Package exists under health_enhancement_services. For property: InsurePlus Standard Coverage exists under home_content; Technology Protection and Smart Home Integration exist under property_enhancement_services. For travel: PrimeTravel Premium Plan exists; 24/7 Travel Assistance and Adventure Travel Coverage exist under travel_enhancement_services. I then extracted their exact ratings.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Physical and mental health insurance - LifeFirst Standard Plan (€100/month), PrimeCare Premium Plan (€130/month), Preventive Care Package (€150/month) - Total: €380/month",
    "property_coverage": "Home/contents insurance - InsurePlus Standard Coverage (€60/month), Technology Protection (€40/month), Smart Home Integration (€45/month) - Total: €145/month", 
    "travel_coverage": "Travel insurance - PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month), 24/7 Travel Assistance (€150/month), Adventure Travel Coverage (€80/month) - Total: €345/month",
    "additional_services": "Enhanced services included within the above packages: 24/7 support, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, dedicated coordinators, crisis support, executive health assessments, temporary accommodation, extended warranties, global emergency coordination, medical evacuation, specialized activity coverage",
    "total_budget": "Complete monthly cost: €870/month (€10,440/annual) - Savings of €115/month (€1,380/annual) compared to previous €985/month spend. Coverage begins January 1, 2025 with binding confirmation received."
